summary: Replace viewer-style Administration labels on the Site Dashboard and site-backed Readiness path with leadership-friendly monitoring language.
selectedReason: Current repo evidence still pointed at this exact role-readiness gap from the audit role map, the open Administration/AP audit rows, and the next-recommended queue in automation state. The slice stayed inside existing workspace render paths, preserved RBAC/site scope, and improved the staff-demo path without inventing a new role or route.
